response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq (Apr 2025-present) directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a strong match for the AI agent development requirement. Prior Optilyz role (3+ years) used TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB — covers core stack and cloud. RIDE Capital experience adds Node/TypeScript/GraphQL with strong engineering practices (TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD). Java experience exists but is older (robotic arms at Altom). Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, though the candidate has deep testing expertise (Jest-equivalent, built own D test runner, TDD workshops) and Node.js framework experience that transfers easily. Kotlin is not mentioned. MongoDB, Docker, MySQL, Git, Linux are all covered. MIT CS degree satisfies the education requirement. Title is Staff-level, which is slightly above Mid-Senior — possibly overqualified but the role allows IC seniority. Overall a very strong fullstack profile with the rare AI-agent bonus.
strengths: Direct AI agent / MCP development experience in current role
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB fullstack track record across multiple senior roles
Strong testing and engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, custom test framework)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (transferable but unconfirmed)
No Kotlin experience; Java experience is older and limited
Staff-level seniority and founder/staff history may exceed the Mid-Senior IC scope

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack

response.justification: The candidate clearly exceeds the experience bar and matches the primary TypeScript/Node/React stack, MongoDB, cloud, and Docker expectations, while uniquely satisfying the AI agent development requirement through current MCP/agentic work. Gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin are real but low-risk given the candidate's polyglot history and demonstrated framework adaptability. Worth interviewing to confirm fit at Mid-Senior IC level and validate Nest.js ramp-up.
